title: leptobalanus humilis
intro: Leptobalanus humilis, also known as the small-leaved oak or dwarf oak, is a small shrub or tree species native to South Africa. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Leptobalanus humilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Leptobalanus humilis can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health conditions.
